## ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Appropriate elements used for intended purposes.
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation:** All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Icon-only buttons and complex components have descriptive labels.
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Text and interactive elements meet WCAG AA standards.
- [ ] **Focus States:** Visible focus indicators are present on all interactive elements.
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** Changes look and work well on different screen sizes.
